goal: In-app bug/feedback reporter: button → screenshot → note modal → Turnstile bot-check → email info@meowtarot.com
done: Footer 'Report a bug' link (EN/แจ้งปัญหา) lazy-imports js/bug-report.js (html2canvas only loads on click). Flow: best-effort html2canvas screenshot of current viewport (downscaled JPEG) → on-brand modal (note textarea + Cloudflare Turnstile widget + screenshot thumb) → submit invokes the bug-report Supabase edge fn → verifies Turnstile server-side (siteverify) → emails info@meowtarot.com via Resend with note + diagnostics table + screenshot attachment. Diagnostics: url, UA, viewport, dpr, locale, active deck, native flag, last 10 JS errors (ring buffer added in common.js initShell). Anonymous-callable (Turnstile is the bot gate, no auth required).
verified: chrome harness: footer button opens modal, screenshot captured (47KB JPEG thumb shows the real page), textarea + turnstile slot present, on-brand styling. node --check passes all. md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
notes: INERT until setup: (1) Turnstile site key → set in js/bug-report.js TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY or window.MEOWTAROT_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY; (2) edge fn env TURNSTILE_SECRET + RESEND_API_KEY; (3) Resend domain verify for the from-address; (4) deploy supabase functions deploy bug-report. info@meowtarot.com already forwards to Gmail via the catch-all. html2canvas screenshots are best-effort (cross-origin CDN art may render blank).
